data.title: Bitcoin Faces Stagflation Headwinds But Its Supply Structure Tells a Different Story
data.description:
Stagflation fears are returning to the U. S. economy, and Bitcoin sits awkwardly in the middle: a risk asset that also carries a hard-scarcity argument. What the Macro Data Is Showing The setup is familiar
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-faces-stagflation-headwinds-but-its-supply-structure-tells-a-different-story/

data.title: Russia Urges Caution Amid Azerbaijan-Iran Tensions
data.description: Russia's Foreign Ministry has called for Azerbaijan and Iran to exercise extreme caution and avoid reckless actions amid rising tensions between the two nations. According to Jin10, the ministry emphasized the importance of diplomatic efforts to prevent further escalation and maintain regional stability. The statement comes as both countries have experienced strained relations, prompting concerns over potential conflict. Russia's appeal highlights the need for dialogue and cooperation to address underlying issues and foster peace in the region.

data.title: Israel Conducts Airstrikes on Iranian Military Targets in Tehran
data.description: The Israeli Defense Forces announced on March 7 that its air force carried out extensive nighttime airstrikes on multiple military targets in Tehran, Iran. According to Jin10, the operation involved precision strikes on facilities associated with the Quds Force of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. These facilities were reportedly used for transferring weapons to Hezbollah in Lebanon, utilizing 16 aircraft in the operation.

data.title: Iran Seeks New U.S. Targets Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: An unnamed senior Iranian official revealed in an interview with CNN that Iran is actively seeking new U.S. targets for potential strikes. According to Jin10, this move comes in response to U.S. President Donald Trump's recent threat of a 'very severe' attack on Iran. The escalating tensions between the two nations have raised concerns about potential conflicts in the region.

data.title: Ethereum Co-Founder Suspected of Selling $157 Million in ETH
data.description: Ethereum co-founder Jeffrey Wilcke is suspected of selling 79,300 ETH, valued at approximately $157 million, from his address. According to NS3.AI, the address became active again after a 7-month hiatus, as monitored by Ai Yi.

data.title: Historical Parallels: The Know Nothing Party and Modern Immigration Politics
data.description:
The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X. The Know Nothing Party, a political group from the mid-1800s, emerged during a period of significant immigration. It was primarily focused on a single issue, immigration, while its members held divergent views on other matters, particularly slavery. As immigration rates decreased by approximately 50%, the central issue binding the coalition weakened, leading to the party's rapid dissolution.

This historical scenario draws parallels to the current political landscape, where many supporters of U.S. President Donald Trump prioritize immigration above other political concerns. Despite differing views on various topics, Trump's supporters are united by their emphasis on immigration, reminiscent of the Know Nothing Party's focus during its brief existence.

data.title: UAE Urges Iran to Cease Aggression Against Gulf Nations
data.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) has called on Iran to halt its aggressive actions towards non-belligerent Gulf countries. According to Jin10, UAE officials emphasized the importance of regional stability and urged Iran to immediately cease any hostile activities. The UAE's appeal comes amid ongoing tensions in the Gulf region, highlighting the need for diplomatic solutions to ensure peace and security. The call for restraint is part of broader efforts to maintain harmony among neighboring states and prevent further escalation of conflicts.

data.title: Plug Power Aims to Supply Hydrogen Electricity Amid AI Demand
data.description: Plug Power is preparing to provide hydrogen electricity in a potential special auction by the largest U.S. power grid. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's efforts to meet the growing energy demands driven by the artificial intelligence boom. This move is part of a broader strategy to capitalize on the increasing need for sustainable energy solutions in the tech industry.

data.title: ETH co-founders suspected of selling $157 million worth of ETH.
data.description: According to AiYi's monitoring, ETH co-founder Jeffrey Wilcke appears to have sold 79,300 ETH, worth $157 million. Seven months later, his addresses have become active again, with four addresses transferring a large amount of ETH to Kraken five minutes ago; he currently holds 27,400 ETH on-chain, with a total value of $54.37 million.

data.title: Iran Accuses U.S. of Attacking Desalination Plant on Qeshm Island
data.description: Iran's Foreign Minister has accused the United States of committing a blatant and reckless act by attacking a desalination plant on Qeshm Island. According to Jin10, the attack has disrupted water supply to 30 villages, highlighting the severe consequences of targeting Iranian infrastructure. The minister emphasized that this dangerous precedent was set by the U.S., not Iran.

data.title: Iran Attacks UAE: Potential Impact on U.S. Al Dhafra Air Base
data.description: Iran has launched an attack on the United Arab Emirates, raising concerns about the potential impact on the U.S. Al Dhafra Air Base. According to Jin10, the situation is developing, and the extent of the damage or strategic implications remains unclear. The attack underscores ongoing geopolitical tensions in the region, with potential ramifications for U.S. military operations and regional stability. Further updates are awaited as authorities assess the situation and respond to the unfolding events.

data.title: Iran Attributes Non-Military Target Attacks to U.S. Electronic Defense Systems
data.description: Iran's permanent mission to the United Nations has preliminarily assessed that some recent incidents involving attacks on non-military targets may have been intercepted by U.S. electronic defense systems. According to Jin10, this evaluation comes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and concerns over military engagements in the region. The Iranian delegation's statement highlights the complexity of attributing responsibility for such incidents, emphasizing the role of advanced defense technologies in modern warfare. This development adds another layer to the intricate geopolitical landscape, where electronic warfare capabilities are increasingly influencing strategic decisions.

data.title: Oil Futures Rise Amid Iran Conflict, Bitcoin Futures Lead Trading Volume
data.description: Perpetual futures on oil at the crypto exchange Hyperliquid increased by 4%, reaching approximately $92 per barrel as traders accounted for the second week of the Iran conflict. According to NS3.AI, gold and silver contracts on the platform also saw gains, with gold rising about 1.5% and silver increasing by 2.2%. Silver trading volume reached approximately $150 million within 24 hours. Meanwhile, Bitcoin futures remained the most traded product on the platform, with a daily volume exceeding $2.8 billion, while Bitcoin's price stabilized around $68,000.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Discusses Language Translation Preferences
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently expressed his views on language translation, stating that he can discern the quality of translations and prefers not to spend time learning new languages. According to Jin10, Trump emphasized the importance of having a skilled translator, asserting that he would not invest time in language learning himself. This statement highlights his reliance on professional translation services to ensure effective communication.

data.title: U.S. Military Utilizes UK Bases Amid Strategic Developments
data.description: The UK Ministry of Defence has announced that the United States has commenced operations using British military bases. According to Jin10, this move is part of ongoing strategic collaborations between the two nations, reflecting a deepening of military ties. The utilization of UK bases by the U.S. military underscores the importance of bilateral defense agreements and shared security interests. This development comes amid broader geopolitical shifts and highlights the significance of international military cooperation in addressing global security challenges.

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Highlights Domestic Border Concerns
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has expressed concerns over the nation's focus on distant borders while neglecting its own hemisphere. According to Jin10, Hegseth emphasized the importance of addressing domestic border issues, suggesting that the United States should prioritize its own territorial integrity. This statement reflects a shift in perspective towards enhancing national security by concentrating on local challenges rather than solely on international ones. Hegseth's remarks come amid ongoing debates about border security and national defense strategies.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Claims Credit for Ending Eight Wars
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has asserted that he is responsible for ending eight wars. According to Jin10, Trump made this statement during a recent address, highlighting his administration's efforts in foreign policy and conflict resolution. The President emphasized his role in bringing peace and stability to regions previously embroiled in conflict. This claim comes amid ongoing discussions about the U.S.'s military involvement overseas and its impact on global geopolitics. Trump's remarks are part of a broader narrative of his presidency, focusing on reducing military engagements and prioritizing diplomatic solutions.

data.title: Airbus Considers Joint Bid for Bundeswehr Internet Service
data.description: Airbus is reportedly considering a collaboration with German defense company Rheinmetall and local satellite manufacturer OHB to develop an internet service similar to Starlink for the Bundeswehr armed forces. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the situation, that the potential partnership aims to enhance the military's communication capabilities. The initiative reflects a growing interest in satellite-based internet services for defense purposes, as nations seek to improve their technological infrastructure. Details of the proposal and its potential impact on the Bundeswehr's operations remain under discussion.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Comments on Ukraine-Russia Consensus Challenges
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed skepticism about the possibility of Ukraine and Russia reaching a consensus. According to Jin10, Trump stated that achieving agreement between the two nations is extremely difficult, noting that previous attempts have often been thwarted by one party withdrawing. He emphasized that the situation does not significantly impact the United States due to the geographical separation by an ocean. Trump remarked that his efforts are aimed at benefiting Europe.

data.title: Iranian media: Iran says it is waiting for the US Navy to escort its ships.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency, Iran says it is awaiting US naval escort for its ships. The US should recall the recent attacks on oil tankers. (Jinshi)
